mapper.sql: kdte.id, kdte.employee_id, kdte.department_tree_id, kdte.attribute1, kdte.attribute2, kdte.attribute3, kdte.attribute4, kdte.attribute5, kdte.create_time, kdte.create_by, kdte.update_time, kdte.update_by, kdte.enabled_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.department_tree_id as ${tAlias}_department_tree_id, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_department_tree_employee (employee_id, department_tree_id, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{departmentTreeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},1)
mapper.update: update kpi_department_tree_employee set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, department_tree_id = #{departmentTreeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{criteria.enabled,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pe.name,pe.work_card,kdte.department_tree_id,kdte.id,kdte.employee_id from kpi_department_tree kdt left join kpi_department_tree_employee kdte on kdt.id = kdte.department_tree_id left join pm_employee pe on pe.id = kdte.employee_id where kdte.enabled_flag = 1 and kdt.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update kpi_department_tree_employee set update_time = getdate(), enabled_flag = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
